_comment: LLM-MAINTAINED MODULE MAP for @argo/desktop. Single source of truth for module boundaries; .dependency-cruiser.cjs turns it into lint rules mechanically тАФ edit this map, never the generated rules. Refresh when the src/ structure changes. Managed by the setup-module-boundaries skill.

modules.name: shared
modules.comment: Cross-process contract: the Session state list and the union derived from it, the ship facts main observes, the event vocabulary, projected-state types, IPC channel names, the pure projection reducer, and the ribbon derivation (session facts тЖТ ship-flow render state). Types, frozen constants and pure functions only тАФ no I/O, no framework. `SessionView` carries facts, never a rendered state, so grading stays on the renderer's side of the bridge. Imported by all three processes (renderer files reach it through the `@shared` alias), imports none of them.

modules.name: main
modules.comment: Electron main process. Its internals are private; the app is wired only from its own entry.

modules.name: preload
modules.comment: The context-bridge. Loaded by Electron via file path, not imported тАФ nothing should import its internals.

modules.name: renderer
modules.comment: The UI (browser context). Talks to main only through the window bridge, never by import.

modules.name: console
modules.comment: The Console domain (cockpit-matrix.md R13): the ONE monospace surface, its channel strip and channel body, plus the channel vocabulary and the three derivations over it (`captureLabel`, `resolveActiveChannel`, `feedLines`). Console-only by construction тАФ `session ┬╖ live` plus AT MOST ONE capture slot тАФ so it is not part of the shared `components/ui` kit; the screen composes it through this barrel.

modules.name: ship
modules.comment: The renderer's ship-flow presentation: the rail status word (tone, icon) and the `shipState` composition. The ribbon derivation it composes lives in `shared`, so main can drive gates from the same pure code (cockpit-matrix.md R16). No React, no I/O тАФ Views consume the model through this barrel and never re-derive it.

layers._comment: Electron process isolation: the three processes must never import each other at all тАФ the only channels are the preload bridge (rendererтЖФmain) and Electron's own preload wiring (mainтЖТpreload by path). Importing across them is the classic footgun this locks out. All three may import `shared` (the type/pure-function contract); `shared` must import none of them.
